steps.t: Fire threatens to consume this building if it is not extinguished soon. You should look for something to use near the water to put the flames out.
Fire threatens to consume this building if it is not extinguished soon. You should look for something to use near the water to put the flames out.
The burning building is in the lumber-yard, north-east of Aldburg. You should bring the bucket full of water back to the burning building and extingui…
